hausa.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass mai zurfi na salon 808
hausa.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) ya tsara harmony na bebop. Tsarinsa yana amfani da 6th chords maimakon 7ths kuma yana ƙara diminished passing chords tsakanin digiri na scale don jagorancin murya cikin sauƙi.
hausa.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: lokacin kaiwa cikakken volume. Decay: lokacin sauka zuwa sustain. Sustain: matakin volume da ake riƙe. Release: lokacin ɓacewa bayan an saki key.
hausa.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale saiti ne na pitches da aka tsara. Modes juyawa ne na scale da ke farawa daga digiri daban-daban. Kowanne yana ƙirƙirar yanayi daban na ji.
hausa.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Ana gina chords ta hanyar tara intervals (3rds). Major yana amfani da major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor yana juya su. Extended chords suna ƙara 7ths, 9ths, da fiye da haka.
hausa.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks suna amfani da sine oscillator mai pitch sweep. Snares suna haɗa noise (an tace) + tone body. Hi-hats suna amfani da high-pass filtered noise bursts.
hausa.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = quarter-note beats 4 a kowane bar (mafi yawan gama-gari). 3/4 = jin waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 da 7/8 suna ƙirƙirar grooves marasa daidaituwa, na baƙo.
hausa.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: An tsara keys ta hawan 5ths bisa agogo. Keys makwabta suna raba 6 cikin 7 na notes. Tafiya bisa agogo yana ƙara sharps; akasin agogo yana ƙara flats.
hausa.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Kowace sautin kiɗa tana ɗauke da overtones sama da fundamental. Ƙarfinsu na kwatanci yana tantance timbre — shi ya sa trumpet ke jin daban da flute a pitch ɗaya.
hausa.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval shine nisa tsakanin pitches biyu, ana auna shi cikin semitones. Rabon frequency yana tantance consonance (rabo mai sauƙi kamar 3:2 yana jin santsi).
hausa.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Yana kunna notes na chord ɗaya-ɗaya cikin jere. Sama = daga ƙasa zuwa sama, Ƙasa = daga sama zuwa ƙasa. Yana ƙirƙirar patterns masu gudana daga chords tsayayye.
hausa.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter yana cire frequencies sama da (lowpass), ƙasa da (highpass), ko kewaye da (bandpass) cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) yana ƙara frequencies kusa da cutoff, yana ƙirƙirar peak.
hausa.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: canje-canjen volume na lokaci-lokaci (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: canje-canjen pitch na lokaci-lokaci (frequency modulation). Duka ana sarrafa su da LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
hausa.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: An gano shi a 1983. Noise burst yana shiga cikin gajeriyar delay line mai feedback. Lokacin delay yana tantance pitch. Filter a cikin feedback loop yana sarrafa haske da decay. Yana kwaikwayon plucked strings ta ɗabi'a.
hausa.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer kayan aikin tsara kiɗa ne. Kowane step yana wakiltar subdivision na beat. Layin melody yana saita pitched notes, drums suna ƙara rhythm. Musical notation yana nuna abin da ka ƙirƙira.
hausa.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes a kan lines da spaces suna wakiltar pitches. Ana nuna tsawon lokaci da siffar note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff yana da lines 5.
hausa.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 a kowane octave, rabo 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier na Bach (1722) ya shawo kan duniya kan wannan sasantawa. Kowace note da kake kunna nan tana zaune a kan wannan grid.
hausa.scales_the_major_minor_modal_grammar: Scales — grammar na major + minor + modal
hausa.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) suna zuwa daga juya interval pattern na major scale.
hausa.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords suna ƙara wani third. Pop music = ~chords 6 masu maimaituwa; jazz yana amfani da extensions da substitutions.
hausa.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — gado ƙarƙashin kusan kowace cinematic score. Gwada iv-V-i a minor, ko i-VI-VII don jin Hans Zimmer. Drones a fifths suna tallafawa kiɗan gargajiya na India da al'adun bagpipe.
hausa.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Yawancin shahararrun kiɗa suna a 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (jin half-time). Kick a 1+3, snare a 2+4 = backbeat — tushen rock + pop.
hausa.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) ya gano consonance daga integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz ya faɗaɗa wannan a 1862. Sauti = compression waves; kiɗa = patterns da muka yarda mu kira kyakkyawa.
hausa.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Cikakken chord grid, strum plate, da voice presets
hausa.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Ja a kan strings don ka yi strum!
hausa.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis yana amfani da oscillator ɗaya (modulator) don canza frequency na wani (carrier) da sauri. Rabon modulator:carrier yana tantance harmonic content. Rabo mai sauƙi (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) yana samar da harmonic tones. Rabo mai rikitarwa yana samar da metallic, bell-like, ko inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 ya shahara da FM a 1983.
hausa.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw yana tara sawtooth oscillators da yawa da aka ɗan detune daga juna. Wannan yana ƙirƙirar babbar, faɗi, sauti mai walƙiya — alamar EDM, trance, da pop na zamani. Ƙarin voices = mafi kauri amma yana amfani da CPU fiye. Detuning yana sarrafa yadda voices suke da nisa a tuning — ƙarin detune = mafi faɗi/kamar chorus, ƙasa = mafi ƙarfi/mai da hankali.
hausa.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator yana kunna notes na chord ɗaya-ɗaya cikin jere. "Sama" yana tafiya daga ƙasa zuwa sama, yana ƙirƙirar makamashi mai hawa. "Ƙasa" yana sauka don jin kamar magudanar ruwa. Kasa yana sarrafa gudu (ƙasa = da sauri). Gate yana sarrafa tsawon lokacin da kowace note ke ƙara (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Gwada kasa=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern don classic trance arp!
hausa.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Yi waƙa, magana, ko kunna kayan kiɗa — ji effects a lokaci-lokaci!
hausa.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (ji kanka — yi amfani da headphones!)
hausa.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Yadda Effects ke Canza Sound Waves
hausa.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Yana cire frequencies sama da (lowpass) ko ƙasa da (highpass) threshold. Kamar rufe baki da hannu — frequencies masu tsayi suna ɓacewa, sauti yana zama mafi "duhu."
hausa.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Yana ƙirƙirar echoes ta kwafin signal da kunna shi bayan ɗan lokaci. Feedback yana sarrafa yawan echoes da suke maimaituwa.
hausa.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Yana kwaikwayon acoustics na ɗaki ta ƙirƙirar dubban ƙananan echoes da suka haɗu tare. Ƙaramin ɗaki = gajeriyar reverb, babban coci = dogon reverb.
hausa.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Yana yanke peaks na waveform, yana juya santsin sine waves zuwa siffofi masu kaifi. Wannan yana ƙara sabbin harmonics da ba su cikin ainihin sauti ba.
hausa.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Yana kwafin signal da ɗan delay mai canjawa koyaushe. Wannan yana kwaikwayon voices/kayan kiɗa da yawa suna kunna tare ba tare da daidaituwa ba.
hausa.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Yana canza volume sama da ƙasa da sauri, yana ƙirƙirar tasirin bugawa. Gama-gari a cikin surf guitar da kiɗan organ.
hausa.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Yi amfani da headphones lokacin monitoring don gujewa feedback loops! Mic yana bi ta duk effects da ke sama (filter, delay, reverb, da sauransu) — daidaita su don ka ji yadda kowanne ke canza muryarka ko kayan kiɗanka.
hausa.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Haɗa microphone ɗinka don gudanar da muryarka ko kayan kiɗanka ta cikin effects chain a lokaci-lokaci.
hausa.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Duba muryarka a matsayin waveform + frequency spectrum. Ji yadda filter, delay, reverb, distortion, da chorus ke canza sound waves ta jiki.
hausa.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Taɓa & ja — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
hausa.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad yana taswirar wurin yatsa/mouse ɗinka zuwa musical parameters a lokaci-lokaci. X axis yana sarrafa pitch (hagu = ƙasa, dama = sama). Y axis yana sarrafa filter cutoff frequency (sama = haske, ƙasa = duhu). Wannan yana kama da kayan kiɗa kamar Korg Kaoss Pad, wanda ya sauya live electronic music performance ta hanyar juya 2D gestures zuwa sauti.
hausa.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Hagu–dama shine pitch, sama–ƙasa shine filter brightness. Yi amfani da arrow keys don motsi da kunna note; danna Escape ko Space don tsayawa.
hausa.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & fiye →
hausa.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Danna cells don sanya notes — visual melody editor
hausa.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions na gama-gari — danna ka ji
hausa.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions suna ƙirƙirar tafiye-tafiyen ji. Chord na I (tonic) yana jin kamar 'gida.' Chord na V (dominant) yana ƙirƙirar tashin hankali da ke son warwarewa zuwa I. Chord na vi (relative minor) yana ƙara baƙin ciki ko zurfi. Chord na IV (subdominant) yana motsawa daga gida a hankali. An ƙiyasta cewa I-V-vi-IV progression yana bayyana a cikin fiye da 70% na waƙoƙin pop saboda yana daidaita waɗannan ji sosai.
hausa.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Lambobin Roman (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) suna wakiltar digiri na scale. Babban baƙi = major chord. Ƙaramin baƙi = minor chord.
hausa.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ƙara melody notes a grid ɗin sama ↑
hausa.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Danna melody cells a grid ɗin sama don ka ga notation nan
hausa.load_this_rhythm_into_row_0_kick: A loading wannan rhythm zuwa row 0 (Kick)?
hausa.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Danna "Ƙalubalance ni!" don yin aikin rhythm patterns
hausa.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Upload WAV/MP3 files don custom pads. Samples suna share lokacin da aka sabunta shafi.
hausa.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ƙara pattern na yanzu a matsayin section
hausa.add_current_as_section: + Ƙara na Yanzu a matsayin Section
hausa.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Ƙirƙiri drum pattern a grid ɗin sama, sannan danna "+ Ƙara na Yanzu a matsayin Section" don fara gina waƙa.
hausa.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
hausa.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Babu beats da aka ajiye tukuna. Ƙirƙiri pattern ka danna Ajiye!
hausa.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad yana ƙirƙirar warm, tsantsan tones ta haɗa sine da triangle waves. Zaɓi voice, ɗauki chord daga grid ɗin ƙasa, sannan strum plate!
hausa.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — taɓa don zaɓe, Space don strum
hausa.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — taɓa ko ja a kai
hausa.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Ji, duba waveform, ka koyi tarihin kowace kayan kiɗa
hausa.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Ta haka ne kayan kiɗa daban-daban ke samun sauti na musamman! Sarewa mafi yawa harmonic 1 ce (sine). Clarinet tana da odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin tana da dukansu. Danna don gina timbre naka!
hausa.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis yana ƙirƙirar sauti na gaskiya na plucked string ta amfani da gajeriyar noise burst da aka aika zuwa delay line mai filtered feedback. Daidaita brightness (launin noise na farko) da damping (tsawon sustain) don siffanta halin string.
hausa.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Gano kowace note a cikin melody na notes 4:
hausa.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: Ƙarfin high harmonics — yana huda / walƙiya.
hausa.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Mai nauyin fundamental, high masu laushi. Kamar acoustic.
hausa.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mai nauyin mid ba tare da fundamental — kamar itace/cuckoo flute.
hausa.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Kusan tsantsan fundamental — an rufe / kamar sub.
hausa.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics kusan daidai — cikakke / timbre na halitta.
hausa.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Daidaita matakan harmonic na fundamental, mid, da high. Widget yana rarraba sauti zuwa ɗaya cikin timbre biyar daban. Babu score, babu bayyanawa — kawai sweep ka lura.
hausa.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Hasashe (rubutu na kyauta): Wanne harmonic level ke tantance "haske" da "warm"?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 An makale — nuna prompts a buɗe
hausa.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Riƙe sliders biyu daram. Motsa ɗaya. Lura.
hausa.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Nemo saituna biyu da ke samar da timbre ɗaya. Wanne rabo suke rabawa?
hausa.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Kayan kiɗa na gaskiya suna da spectra na musamman. Bincika dalilin da ya sa sarewa ke jin daban da violin.
hausa.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Bayyana yadda harmonic content ke tantance mtazamar timbre.
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Bayanin ƙira: timbre marker na azuzuwa 5 daban; babu acoustic fidelity score; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ta amfani da kalmomi masu sauƙi na yau da kullum da gajerun jimloli, ba tare da jargon ba
hausa.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: don ɗalibin aji 5, a taƙaice da abokantaka
hausa.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: don ɗalibin da ya riga ya san wasu music theory
hausa.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Danna "Bayyana" don AI tutor ya bayyana abin da wannan view ke koyarwa a matakin karatu da ka zaɓa.
hausa.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Dalilin da ya sa kayan kiɗa ke jin daban
